con:part.con:content: <wsdl:definitions targetNamespace="http://www.apinizer.com/xml/school" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:sch="http://www.apinizer.com/xml/school" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:tns="http://www.apinizer.com/xml/school"> <wsdl:types> <xs:schema elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://www.apinizer.com/xml/school" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <!--Student complex type--> <xs:complexType name="Student"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="name" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="standard" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element name="address" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="date" type="xs:date"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <!--Get single student--> <xs:element name="StudentDetailsRequest"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="name" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="StudentDetailsResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="Student" type="tns:Student"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <!--Get all students--> <xs:element name="StudentDetailsList"> <xs:complexType/> </xs:element> <!--MTOM: File attachment request--> <xs:element name="FileAttachmentRequest"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="fileName" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <!--MTOM: File attachment response (binary data)--> <xs:element name="FileAttachmentResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="fileName" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="contentType" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="size" type="xs:long"/> <xs:element name="data" type="xs:base64Binary"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <!--MTOM: File upload request (binary data in)--> <xs:element name="FileUploadRequest"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="fileName" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="contentType" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="data" type="xs:base64Binary"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <!--MTOM: File upload response--> <xs:element name="FileUploadResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="status" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="message" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="size" type="xs:long"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:schema> </wsdl:types> <wsdl:message name="StudentDetailsRequest"> <wsdl:part element="tns:StudentDetailsRequest" name="StudentDetailsRequest"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="FileAttachmentRequest"> <wsdl:part element="tns:FileAttachmentRequest" name="FileAttachmentRequest"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="StudentDetailsResponse"> <wsdl:part element="tns:StudentDetailsResponse" name="StudentDetailsResponse"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="FileAttachmentResponse"> <wsdl:part element="tns:FileAttachmentResponse" name="FileAttachmentResponse"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="FileUploadRequest"> <wsdl:part element="tns:FileUploadRequest" name="FileUploadRequest"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="FileUploadResponse"> <wsdl:part element="tns:FileUploadResponse" name="FileUploadResponse"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:portType name="StudentDetailsPort"> <wsdl:operation name="StudentDetails"> <wsdl:input message="tns:StudentDetailsRequest" name="StudentDetailsRequest"></wsdl:input> <wsdl:output message="tns:StudentDetailsResponse" name="StudentDetailsResponse"></wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="FileAttachment"> <wsdl:input message="tns:FileAttachmentRequest" name="FileAttachmentRequest"></wsdl:input> <wsdl:output message="tns:FileAttachmentResponse" name="FileAttachmentResponse"></wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="FileUpload"> <wsdl:input message="tns:FileUploadRequest" name="FileUploadRequest"></wsdl:input> <wsdl:output message="tns:FileUploadResponse" name="FileUploadResponse"></wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:portType> <wsdl:binding name="StudentDetailsPortSoap11" type="tns:StudentDetailsPort"> <soap:binding style="document" transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <wsdl:operation name="StudentDetails"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://www.apinizer.com/xml/school/getStudentList"/> <wsdl:input name="StudentDetailsRequest"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="StudentDetailsResponse"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="FileAttachment"> <soap:operation soapAction=""/> <wsdl:input name="FileAttachmentRequest"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="FileAttachmentResponse"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="FileUpload"> <soap:operation soapAction=""/> <wsdl:input name="FileUploadRequest"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="FileUploadResponse"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:binding> <wsdl:service name="StudentDetailsPortService"> <wsdl:port binding="tns:StudentDetailsPortSoap11" name="StudentDetailsPortSoap11"> <soap:address location="https://service.apinizer.com:80/service/student-details"/> </wsdl:port> </wsdl:service> </wsdl:definitions>
